caption: A man wearing a large, grey, pointed wig, glasses, a white collared shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders sits in a room that looks like a studio or store. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a black microphone. To his right, a white box and black bags are visible, while the wall behind him is covered in framed photographs. Various clothing items and a "LEE" logo are visible on shelves in the background. Two logos appear on the screen: one says "THE TALK" with "PODCAST" below it, and another reads "GOSS TALK JOY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly tilting his head and shifting his facial expression while appearing to speak into the microphone.
